case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. SABRINA COSENTINO

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,073.33 FILED BY TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT COSENTINO, SABRINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COSENTINO, SABRINA THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-22-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-15-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COSENTINO, SABRINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.
